title: Local athlete on national radio tonight
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local athlete Ricardi...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local athlete Ricardi Matthee will be interviewed on the programme, Kompas, on the national radio station, Radio Sonder Grense (RSG) this evening at 19:30.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local athlete Ricardi Matthee will be interviewed on the programme, Kompas, on the national radio station, Radio Sonder Grense (RSG) this evening at 19:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The programme focuses on the youth and especially those who achieve exceptionally.","html":"The programme focuses on the youth and especially those who achieve exceptionally."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ricardi has optical atrophy, a condition in which the eyesight progressively diminishes.Despite this, he has excelled in sport and academically.","html":"Ricardi has optical atrophy, a condition in which the eyesight progressively diminishes.
Despite this, he has excelled in sport and academically."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dream","html":"Dream"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He competes as a T13 athlete in terms of his eyesight challenge. His dream this year is to qualify for the Paralympic Games in Paris.","html":"He competes as a T13 athlete in terms of his eyesight challenge. His dream this year is to qualify for the Paralympic Games in Paris."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A Curro Mossel Bay independent school matric learner last year, Ricardi also showed remarkable prowess academically, besides his sport achievements.","html":"A Curro Mossel Bay independent school matric learner last year, Ricardi also showed remarkable prowess academically, besides his sport achievements."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He maintained a 64% average throughout the year and achieved a 61% aggregate for his final examination, a feat for someone with a 95% visual impairment.","html":"He maintained a 64% average throughout the year and achieved a 61% aggregate for his final examination, a feat for someone with a 95% visual impairment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"African Games","html":"African Games"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ricardi represented South Africa at the African Games in Athletics for athletes with disabilities in Malawi. There he won gold in the 100m and silver in the 200m events.","html":"Ricardi represented South Africa at the African Games in Athletics for athletes with disabilities in Malawi. There he won gold in the 100m and silver in the 200m events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During the South African Championship for People with Disabilities, Ricardi attained gold in the 100m event, setting a new South African record, and won gold in the long jump and silver in the 200m.","html":"During the South African Championship for People with Disabilities, Ricardi attained gold in the 100m event, setting a new South African record, and won gold in the long jump and silver in the 200m."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He also won a gold medal at the SA Judo Championships in the 66kg division.","html":"He also won a gold medal at the SA Judo Championships in the 66kg division."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Excellence Award","html":"Excellence Award"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ricardi received an Excellence Award at the Curro Matric Gala Awards 2024 at the end of last month.","html":"Ricardi received an Excellence Award at the Curro Matric Gala Awards 2024 at the end of last month."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The award was for achieving academic excellence despite adverse circumstances.Ricardi will be attending athletics events in South Africa and abroad in his quest to qualify for the Paralympic Games.","html":"The award was for achieving academic excellence despite adverse circumstances.
Ricardi will be attending athletics events in South Africa and abroad in his quest to qualify for the Paralympic Games."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you wish to support him with funding, find out more at: https://www.backabuddy.co.za/champion/project/ricardi-matthee-5764696183713157887.","html":"If you wish to support him with funding, find out more at: https://www.backabuddy.co.za/champion/project/ricardi-matthee-5764696183713157887."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Should you miss Ricardi's interview tonight on RSG, go to www.rsg.co.za and click on Potgooi, where you can listen to past interviews.","html":"Should you miss Ricardi's interview tonight on RSG, go to www.rsg.co.za and click on Potgooi, where you can listen to past interviews."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Local athlete on national radio tonight
